narrative: RBNZ Governor Breman signals further rate hikes as inflationary pressures build, driving NZD outperformance as the week's dominant G8 theme with a 1.00% spread over CAD. Dollar firms as Fed officials flag oil price risks and conflicting Iran peace plans introduce geopolitical risk premiums; gold lower -0.14%; equities +0.02%; DXY +0.10%; VIX 16.3. USD/JPY holds at 159.55 supported by 300bp carry, though 25d RR at -1.34 shows moderate put skew. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27 02:00 UTC.
